title: ERP Application Returning HTTP 500 Errors

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] SAP Fiori returning HTTP 500 — approvals module unavailable
servicenow_seed.description: Multiple finance team members report that the SAP Fiori approvals module is returning HTTP 500 Internal Server Error since approximately 09:15. The home dashboard loads but clicking any approval triggers the error. Month-end processing is today.

correct_steps: Validate caller and document affected module (Fiori approvals) and time of onset
Check for other tickets — confirm multiple finance users affected
Set impact 2, urgency 2 given month-end business impact
Capture error details (HTTP 500, time, transaction code if available)
Escalate to Application Support team for SAP Basis investigation
Notify finance manager of ETA and workaround (email approvals if emergency)
rationale: HTTP 500 errors in SAP are application/server-side issues beyond Tier 2 scope. Application Support (SAP Basis) owns this. Month-end context raises urgency — must not sit in the queue.
